title: Hong Kong Civil Law Relationship Graph
notes: Primary Hong Kong Civil Law judgments were fetched from HKLII's public API.
Supplemental textbook passages were used to improve topic coverage and backfill missing authorities.
NotebookLM is optional in this build; uncovered topics are surfaced in monitor_report.json for later enrichment.
Curated lineage paths add Hong Kong and UK authority sequences with FLLW, APPD, DIST, and CODI edges.

members.label: Investors Compensation Scheme Ltd v West Bromwich Building Society
members.note: Originating UK authority for Lord Hoffmann's contextual principles.

members.label: Sinoearn International Ltd v Hyundai-CCECC Joint Venture
members.note: Hong Kong CFA endorsement of the contextual approach.

members.label: Rainy Sky SA v Kookmin Bank
members.note: Commercial common-sense peak in the UK line.

members.label: Fully Profit (Asia) Ltd v Secretary for Justice
members.note: Hong Kong treatment following Rainy Sky.

members.label: Arnold v Britton
members.note: Textualist correction emphasizing contractual language.

members.label: Sany Heavy Industry (HK) Ltd v Sany-Kenton (HK) Ltd
members.note: Recent Hong Kong application of the textualist correction.

members.label: Wood v Capita
members.note: Modern unitary synthesis balancing text and context.

members.label: Stilk v Myrick
members.note: Traditional existing-duty rule.

members.label: Williams v Roffey Bros & Nicholls
members.note: UK practical-benefit exception to the traditional rule.

members.label: UBC (Construction) Ltd v Sung Foo Kee Ltd
members.note: Hong Kong adoption of Williams v Roffey.

members.label: Re Selectmove
members.note: Refused to extend practical benefit to part-payment of debt.

members.label: Chong Cheng Lin Courtney v Cathay Pacific Airways Ltd
members.note: Hong Kong follow-on treatment of the Selectmove limitation.

members.label: MWB Business Exchange Centres Ltd v Rock Advertising Ltd
members.note: Illustrates continuing caution in this area.

members.label: Dunlop Pneumatic Tyre Co Ltd v New Garage & Motor Co Ltd
members.note: Classic genuine pre-estimate versus deterrent framing.

members.label: Cavendish Square Holding BV v El Makdessi
members.note: Modern legitimate-interest and proportionality test.

members.label: Law Ting Pong Secondary School v Chen Wai-mick
members.note: Hong Kong adoption of the Makdessi test.

members.label: China Great Wall AMC (International) Holdings Co Ltd v Royal-Investment Group Corp
members.note: Hong Kong application refining the Law Ting Pong line.

members.label: Royal Bank of Scotland v Etridge (No 2)
members.note: Set the modern bank-procedure approach to constructive notice.

members.label: Li Sau Keung v Bank of China (Hong Kong) Ltd
members.note: Hong Kong follow-on application.

members.label: Unconscionable Contracts Ordinance (Cap. 458)
members.note: Statutory foundation of the Hong Kong doctrine.

members.label: Shum Kong v Chan Man-fai
members.note: Seminal Hong Kong interpretation of the Ordinance.

members.label: Hongkong Fir Shipping Co Ltd v Kawasaki Kisen Kaisha Ltd
members.note: Foundational innominate-term authority with Hong Kong facts.

members.label: Billion Star Development Ltd v Wong Tak-fai
members.note: Modern Hong Kong application on termination rights.

members.label: Donoghue v Stevenson
members.note: House of Lords — neighbour principle; duty of care owed to those who ought reasonably to be in contemplation as affected by acts or omissions.

members.label: Anns v Merton London Borough Council
members.note: Two-stage test: sufficient proximity? Any policy reasons to limit duty? Enabled significant expansion of duty.

members.label: Caparo Industries plc v Dickman
members.note: House of Lords — three-stage test: (1) foreseeable harm, (2) proximity, (3) fair just and reasonable. Replaced Anns incrementalism.

members.label: Luen Hing Fat Cooked Food Stall v Yau Tsim Mong District Board
members.note: Hong Kong Court of Final Appeal applied Caparo three-stage test as the applicable framework.

lineages.title: Judicial Review: From Wednesbury to Proportionality
topic_labels: Basic Law and Bill of Rights

members.label: Associated Provincial Picture Houses Ltd v Wednesbury Corporation
members.note: Court of Appeal — unreasonableness: decision so unreasonable that no reasonable authority could ever have come to it.

members.label: Council of Civil Service Unions v Minister for Civil Service
members.note: House of Lords — three grounds of review: illegality, irrationality, procedural impropriety.

members.label: Hysan Development Co Ltd v Town Planning Board
members.note: Hong Kong Court of Final Appeal — proportionality test applies for BOR/Basic Law rights; Wednesbury applies for non-rights matters.

members.label: Leung Kwok Hung v HKSAR
members.note: Court of Final Appeal applied proportionality to freedom of assembly restrictions under Basic Law.

lineages.title: Unfair Prejudice and Minority Shareholder Protection

members.label: O'Neill v Phillips
members.note: House of Lords — unfair prejudice requires conduct unfair in a commercial sense; legitimate expectations from informal understanding enforceable.

members.label: Re Kong Thai Sawmill (Miri) Sdn Bhd
members.note: Hong Kong Privy Council — just and equitable winding up; loss of mutual confidence in small quasi-partnership company.

members.label: Re Kam Kwan Lai
members.note: Hong Kong Court of First Instance — applied Companies Ordinance s.724 unfair prejudice; buyout remedy ordered.

members.label: Re Chime Communications Ltd
members.note: Court of Appeal — scope of unfair prejudice petition under Cap.622; management exclusion and valuation principles.

lineages.title: Ancillary Relief: From Discretion to Equality

members.label: White v White
members.note: House of Lords — yardstick of equality as check on discretion; no bias against non-money earner; outcome should not discriminate.

members.label: Miller v Miller; McFarlane v McFarlane
members.note: House of Lords — sharing principle, compensation principle, and needs; sharing based on equal partnership of marriage.

members.label: LKW v DD
members.note: Hong Kong Court of Final Appeal — adopted White/Miller framework; equal sharing as starting point; departure requires good reason.

members.label: SPH v SA
members.note: Hong Kong Court of Appeal applied LKW v DD — factors justifying departure from equal sharing in long and short marriages.

lineage_codes.FLLW: Followed or adopted in Hong Kong

viewer_heading_public: Hong Kong Civil Law Hierarchical Knowledge Graph
viewer_heading_internal: Hong Kong Civil Law Internal Hierarchy Explorer
viewer_intro_public: A Hong Kong Civil Law hierarchy and authority network built from HKLII judgments plus local textbook passages. Start at the doctrinal modules, then drill into topics, cases, and statutes.
viewer_intro_internal: This internal Hong Kong Civil Law explorer uses the same hierarchy shell but keeps the graph centered on case metadata, textbook support passages, and statute links.

authority_tree.label_en: Hong Kong Civil Law Knowledge Graph
authority_tree.summary_en: Authority tree for Hong Kong civil law, covering civil procedure and major non-criminal dispute areas including contract, tort, land, company, employment, family, administrative law, probate, trusts, and arbitration.
authority_tree.summary_zh: 涵蓋民事程序及主要非刑事爭議範疇的香港民事法權威樹，包括合約、侵權、土地、公司、僱傭、家事、行政法、遺產信託及仲裁。

modules.label: General Principles of Civil Procedure / 民事程序總則
modules.summary_en: Core procedural stages from commencement and pleadings through interlocutory applications, trial, costs, enforcement, and appeals.
modules.summary_zh: 由展開法律程序及狀書至非正審申請、審訊、訟費、執行及上訴的核心程序。
modules.summary: Core procedural stages from commencement and pleadings through interlocutory applications, trial, costs, enforcement, and appeals.

subgrounds.label: Commencement, Pleadings and Service / 開展程序、狀書及送達
subgrounds.summary_en: Writs, originating summonses, pleadings, amendments, parties, and service of proceedings.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 傳訊令狀、原訴傳票、狀書、修訂、訴訟方及送達。
subgrounds.summary: Writs, originating summonses, pleadings, amendments, parties, and service of proceedings.

subgrounds.label_zh: 非正審申請及案件管理
subgrounds.label: Interlocutory Applications and Case Management / 非正審申請及案件管理
subgrounds.secondary_label: 非正審申請及案件管理
subgrounds.summary_en: Discovery, disclosure, summary disposal, injunctions, security for costs, and case management powers.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 文件透露、披露、簡易處置、禁制令、訟費保證及案件管理權力。
subgrounds.summary: Discovery, disclosure, summary disposal, injunctions, security for costs, and case management powers.

subgrounds.label: Trial, Costs, Enforcement and Appeals / 審訊、訟費、執行及上訴
subgrounds.summary_en: Trial conduct, evidential burdens, costs, enforcement tools, limitation, and civil appeals.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 審訊進行、舉證責任、訟費、執行工具、時效及民事上訴。
subgrounds.summary: Trial conduct, evidential burdens, costs, enforcement tools, limitation, and civil appeals.
topic_labels: Trial Evidence and Burden of Proof

modules.label: Contract Law / 合約法
modules.summary_en: Formation, terms, vitiating factors, breach, termination, remedies, restitution, and statutory contract regimes.
modules.summary_zh: 涵蓋合約成立、條款、影響合約效力因素、違約、終止、補救、返還及法定合約制度。
modules.summary: Formation, terms, vitiating factors, breach, termination, remedies, restitution, and statutory contract regimes.

subgrounds.label: Formation, Terms and Interpretation / 成立、條款及詮釋
subgrounds.summary_en: Offer and acceptance, consideration, intention, incorporation, implied terms, and contractual construction.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 要約與承諾、代價、締約意圖、納入條款、隱含條款及合約詮釋。
subgrounds.summary: Offer and acceptance, consideration, intention, incorporation, implied terms, and contractual construction.

subgrounds.label: Vitiating Factors / 影響合約效力因素
subgrounds.summary_en: Misrepresentation, mistake, duress, undue influence, unconscionability, and illegality.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 失實陳述、錯誤、脅迫、不當影響、不合情理及非法性。
subgrounds.summary: Misrepresentation, mistake, duress, undue influence, unconscionability, and illegality.

subgrounds.label: Breach, Termination and Remedies / 違約、終止及補救
subgrounds.summary_en: Repudiation, termination, damages, penalties, specific performance, injunctions, restitution, and sale of goods remedies.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 毀約、終止、損害賠償、罰款條款、強制履行、禁制令、返還及貨品售賣補救。
subgrounds.summary: Repudiation, termination, damages, penalties, specific performance, injunctions, restitution, and sale of goods remedies.

modules.label: Tort Law / 侵權法
modules.summary_en: Negligence, personal injury, occupiers' liability, vicarious liability, nuisance, defamation, and professional negligence.
modules.summary_zh: 疏忽、個人傷害、佔用人法律責任、轉承責任、滋擾、誹謗及專業疏忽。
modules.summary: Negligence, personal injury, occupiers' liability, vicarious liability, nuisance, defamation, and professional negligence.

subgrounds.label: Negligence Elements / 疏忽要素
subgrounds.summary_en: Duty of care, breach, causation, remoteness, defences, and apportionment.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 謹慎責任、違反責任、因果關係、損害距離、抗辯及分擔責任。
subgrounds.summary: Duty of care, breach, causation, remoteness, defences, and apportionment.

subgrounds.label_en: Personal Injury, Occupiers and Professional Negligence
subgrounds.label_zh: 個人傷害、佔用人及專業疏忽
subgrounds.label: Personal Injury, Occupiers and Professional Negligence / 個人傷害、佔用人及專業疏忽
subgrounds.secondary_label: 個人傷害、佔用人及專業疏忽
subgrounds.summary_en: Assessment of personal injury claims, occupiers' liability, vicarious liability, and professional negligence.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 個人傷害申索評估、佔用人責任、轉承責任及專業疏忽。
subgrounds.summary: Assessment of personal injury claims, occupiers' liability, vicarious liability, and professional negligence.

subgrounds.label: Nuisance and Defamation / 滋擾及誹謗
subgrounds.summary_en: Private nuisance, public nuisance in civil proceedings, defamation, privilege, and remedies.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 私人滋擾、民事程序中的公眾滋擾、誹謗、特權及補救。
subgrounds.summary: Private nuisance, public nuisance in civil proceedings, defamation, privilege, and remedies.

modules.label: Property and Land Law / 物業及土地法
modules.summary_en: Conveyancing, leases, mortgages, co-ownership, easements, covenants, building management, and adverse possession.
modules.summary_zh: 物業轉易、租賃、按揭、共同擁有權、地役權、契諾、建築物管理及逆權管有。
modules.summary: Conveyancing, leases, mortgages, co-ownership, easements, covenants, building management, and adverse possession.

subgrounds.label: Conveyancing and Leases / 物業轉易及租賃
subgrounds.summary_en: Sale and purchase, completion, title, landlord and tenant disputes, forfeiture, and relief.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 買賣、完成交易、業權、業主租客爭議、沒收租賃及濟助。
subgrounds.summary: Sale and purchase, completion, title, landlord and tenant disputes, forfeiture, and relief.

subgrounds.label: Land Interests / 土地權益
subgrounds.summary_en: Mortgages, co-ownership, trusts of land, easements, restrictive covenants, registration, and priorities.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 按揭、共同擁有、土地信託、地役權、限制性契諾、註冊及優先次序。
subgrounds.summary: Mortgages, co-ownership, trusts of land, easements, restrictive covenants, registration, and priorities.

subgrounds.label: Building Management and Possession / 建築物管理及管有
subgrounds.summary_en: Deeds of mutual covenant, incorporated owners, management disputes, adverse possession, and possession claims.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 公契、業主立案法團、管理爭議、逆權管有及管有申索。
subgrounds.summary: Deeds of mutual covenant, incorporated owners, management disputes, adverse possession, and possession claims.
topic_labels: Building Management and Deeds of Mutual Covenant

modules.label: Company and Commercial Law / 公司及商業法
modules.summary_en: Company governance, shareholder remedies, winding up, insolvency, banking, insurance, agency, and commercial transactions.
modules.summary_zh: 公司管治、股東補救、清盤、無力償債、銀行、保險、代理及商業交易。
modules.summary: Company governance, shareholder remedies, winding up, insolvency, banking, insurance, agency, and commercial transactions.

subgrounds.label: Company Governance and Shareholders / 公司管治及股東
subgrounds.summary_en: Directors' duties, shareholder rights, unfair prejudice, derivative actions, and company restoration.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 董事責任、股東權利、不公平損害、衍生訴訟及公司恢復註冊。
subgrounds.summary: Directors' duties, shareholder rights, unfair prejudice, derivative actions, and company restoration.

subgrounds.label: Winding Up and Insolvency / 清盤及無力償債
subgrounds.summary_en: Winding up petitions, statutory demands, bankruptcy, receivership, liquidators, and insolvency-related civil remedies.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 清盤呈請、法定要求償債書、破產、接管人、清盤人及無力償債相關民事補救。
subgrounds.summary: Winding up petitions, statutory demands, bankruptcy, receivership, liquidators, and insolvency-related civil remedies.

subgrounds.label: Commercial Transactions / 商業交易
subgrounds.summary_en: Sale of goods, banking, letters of credit, insurance, agency, guarantees, and securities/regulatory civil proceedings.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 貨品售賣、銀行、信用證、保險、代理、擔保及證券或監管民事程序。
subgrounds.summary: Sale of goods, banking, letters of credit, insurance, agency, guarantees, and securities/regulatory civil proceedings.

modules.label: Employment Law / 僱傭法
modules.summary_en: Employment contracts, wages, termination, dismissal claims, discrimination, employees' compensation, MPF, and restraints.
modules.summary_zh: 僱傭合約、工資、終止、解僱申索、歧視、僱員補償、強積金及限制性條款。
modules.summary: Employment contracts, wages, termination, dismissal claims, discrimination, employees' compensation, MPF, and restraints.

subgrounds.label: Employment Contracts and Termination / 僱傭合約及終止
subgrounds.summary_en: Employment status, wages, contractual duties, termination, dismissal, and severance.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 僱傭身份、工資、合約責任、終止、解僱及遣散。
subgrounds.summary: Employment status, wages, contractual duties, termination, dismissal, and severance.

subgrounds.label: Discrimination and Compensation / 歧視及補償
subgrounds.summary_en: Workplace discrimination, employees' compensation, occupational injury claims, and tribunal proceedings.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 職場歧視、僱員補償、工傷申索及審裁處程序。
subgrounds.summary: Workplace discrimination, employees' compensation, occupational injury claims, and tribunal proceedings.

subgrounds.label: MPF and Restraint of Trade / 強積金及營業限制
subgrounds.summary_en: Mandatory provident fund disputes and post-employment restraints.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 強積金爭議及離職後限制。
subgrounds.summary: Mandatory provident fund disputes and post-employment restraints.

modules.label: Family Law / 家事法
modules.summary_en: Divorce, children, maintenance, ancillary relief, domestic violence, and family injunctions.
modules.summary_zh: 離婚、子女、贍養、附屬濟助、家庭暴力及家事禁制令。
modules.summary: Divorce, children, maintenance, ancillary relief, domestic violence, and family injunctions.

subgrounds.label: Matrimonial and Financial Relief / 婚姻及財務濟助
subgrounds.summary_en: Divorce, separation, maintenance, ancillary relief, and matrimonial property.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 離婚、分居、贍養、附屬濟助及婚姻財產。
subgrounds.summary: Divorce, separation, maintenance, ancillary relief, and matrimonial property.

subgrounds.label: Children and Welfare / 子女及福利
subgrounds.summary_en: Custody, care and control, access, guardianship, relocation, and welfare principles.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 管養權、照顧及管束、探視、監護、遷移及福利原則。
subgrounds.summary: Custody, care and control, access, guardianship, relocation, and welfare principles.

subgrounds.label: Family Protection / 家庭保護
subgrounds.summary_en: Domestic violence, non-molestation orders, occupation orders, and protective injunctions.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 家庭暴力、非騷擾令、佔用令及保護性禁制令。
subgrounds.summary: Domestic violence, non-molestation orders, occupation orders, and protective injunctions.

modules.label: Constitutional and Administrative Law / 憲制及行政法
modules.summary_en: Judicial review, procedural fairness, legitimate expectation, Basic Law, Bill of Rights, and administrative remedies.
modules.summary_zh: 司法覆核、程序公義、合理期望、基本法、人權法案及行政法補救。
modules.summary: Judicial review, procedural fairness, legitimate expectation, Basic Law, Bill of Rights, and administrative remedies.

subgrounds.label: Judicial Review Procedure / 司法覆核程序
subgrounds.summary_en: Leave, standing, promptness, alternative remedies, and public law boundaries.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 許可、申請資格、迅速性、其他補救及公法界線。
subgrounds.summary: Leave, standing, promptness, alternative remedies, and public law boundaries.

subgrounds.label: Fairness, Rights and Remedies / 公義、權利及補救
subgrounds.summary_en: Natural justice, procedural fairness, legitimate expectation, constitutional rights, and public law remedies.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 自然公義、程序公義、合理期望、憲制權利及公法補救。
subgrounds.summary: Natural justice, procedural fairness, legitimate expectation, constitutional rights, and public law remedies.
topic_labels: Basic Law and Bill of Rights

modules.label: Probate, Trusts and Equity / 遺產、信託及衡平法
modules.summary_en: Wills, probate, intestacy, estate administration, trusts, fiduciary duties, tracing, and equitable remedies.
modules.summary_zh: 遺囑、遺囑認證、無遺囑繼承、遺產管理、信託、受信責任、追蹤及衡平法補救。
modules.summary: Wills, probate, intestacy, estate administration, trusts, fiduciary duties, tracing, and equitable remedies.

subgrounds.label: Succession and Estates / 繼承及遺產
subgrounds.summary_en: Wills, testamentary capacity, probate, intestacy, family provision, and estate administration.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 遺囑、立遺囑能力、遺囑認證、無遺囑繼承、家庭供養及遺產管理。
subgrounds.summary: Wills, testamentary capacity, probate, intestacy, family provision, and estate administration.

subgrounds.label: Trusts and Equitable Remedies / 信託及衡平法補救
subgrounds.summary_en: Express trusts, resulting trusts, constructive trusts, fiduciary duties, tracing, account, and equitable compensation.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 明示信託、歸復信託、構定信託、受信責任、追蹤、交代帳目及衡平法補償。
subgrounds.summary: Express trusts, resulting trusts, constructive trusts, fiduciary duties, tracing, account, and equitable compensation.

modules.label: Arbitration and ADR / 仲裁及替代爭議解決
modules.summary_en: Arbitration agreements, stays, award enforcement, setting aside, mediation, settlement, and costs consequences.
modules.summary_zh: 仲裁協議、擱置法律程序、裁決執行、撤銷裁決、調解、和解及訟費後果。
modules.summary: Arbitration agreements, stays, award enforcement, setting aside, mediation, settlement, and costs consequences.

subgrounds.label: Arbitration Procedure and Awards / 仲裁程序及裁決
subgrounds.summary_en: Arbitration agreements, stay of court proceedings, tribunal jurisdiction, enforcement, and setting aside.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 仲裁協議、擱置法院程序、仲裁庭管轄權、執行及撤銷。
subgrounds.summary: Arbitration agreements, stay of court proceedings, tribunal jurisdiction, enforcement, and setting aside.

subgrounds.label: Mediation and Settlement / 調解及和解
subgrounds.summary_en: Mediation confidentiality, settlement agreements, sanctioned offers, Calderbank letters, and costs consequences.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 調解保密、和解協議、附帶條款付款、Calderbank 信件及訟費後果。
subgrounds.summary: Mediation confidentiality, settlement agreements, sanctioned offers, Calderbank letters, and costs consequences.
